purpose: Final report from the synapse-doc-audit swarm (dashboard 1f36a3) on 2026-04-18. Documents a comprehensive 2-wave/7-task documentation audit across five layers (Electron, Server, UI, Agent/Commands, Documentation Gaps). Reports findings (stale counts, missing services like AutoUpdateService, undocumented endpoints, incomplete component inventories, missing !instrument and p_track_plan docs, complete absence of troubleshooting), corrections applied (12 modified, 2 created files), remaining gaps (testing, performance, migration, ADRs), and recommendations.
gotchas: Stale count drift was the most common finding -- automated CI checks recommended
Three CLAUDE.md tasks ran in parallel -- holistic review needed to prevent merge conflicts
AutoUpdateService gap existed because service was added without doc update
patterns: Two-phase audit: pre-planning research across 5 layers, then targeted corrections in 7 tasks/2 waves
Wave 1 parallel (5 audit tasks), Wave 2 dependent (CLAUDE.md consolidation + final report)
conventions: Each finding documents Item / Before / After in tables
Final report covers Executive Summary, Methodology, Findings, Change Log, Remaining Gaps, Recommendations, Swarm Metadata
